# Obligatory AI Generated Comment Guideline

## Rule
For every newly created file and every newly created class, include this exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Required behavior
1. Add the comment near the top of each new file.
2. Add the same comment in or directly above each new class definition.
3. Keep the text exact (no rewording).
